description: Items with both civilian and military applications, controlled under the Wassenaar Arrangement and HK Strategic Trade Controls
Chemicals that can be used in the manufacture of chemical weapons, controlled under the CWC
Items related to missile delivery systems, controlled under the MTCR
Nuclear materials and related technology controlled under the Nuclear Suppliers Group guidelines
Conventional military items requiring Strategic Commodities licence from TID
Advanced surveillance and law-enforcement equipment with dual-use potential
